movie.actors: Colm Meaney, Mykelti Williamson, Nick Chinlund, Renoly Santiago
movie.awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. Another 7 wins & 9 nominations.
movie.plot: Newly paroled ex-con and former U.S. Ranger Cameron Poe finds himself trapped in a prisoner transport plane when the passengers seize control.
movie.title: Con Air
